creator: drsiefer@cacd.rockwell.com
text:
Under the 3.0-980426-SNAP, adding the perl-5.00404 package from
3.0-packages dir on ftp.freebsd.org results in failed execution with the
message:

ld.so failed: Can't find shared library "libnet.so.0.92"

I can duplicate this problem on a freshly installed 3.0-980311-SNAP
machine as well. I do not see this problem on my 2.2.5-RELEASE or
2.2.6-RELEASE machines, nor can I find the "libnet.so.0.92" file
anywhere on the RELEASE machines. Pkg'ing problem in 3.0-packages?

How-To-Repeat: Install 3.0-980311-SNAP or 3.0-980426-SNAP and try installing the
perl-5.00404 package from ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/packages-3.0.
Could affect other 3.0 SNAPS as well (untested).
